The '''B22 Hold-Out Blaster''' was a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]] designed by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Politics/Legends|political]] agents. Its special handgrip allowed easy concealment and quick draws from a pocket.<ref name="AEG" />

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The B22 Hold-Out Blaster was first mentioned and illustrated in the [[1997]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|roleplaying]] supplement ''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'' by [[West End Games]].<ref name="GFT" />
